items.example: Before going blind, Sargy was a landscape painter.
I had the most extraordinary sensation when I touched the canvas.
These bits of Blu-Tack are actually coordinates for where to paint.
His later paintings are edgy and full of impact.
The idea of painting when you were totally blind seemed a nonsense to me.
I wonder what would happen if I give that a go.
Sargy uses Blu-Tack to mark coordinates on the canvas.
What is your greatest achievement in life?
